audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer arguments to ber_pvt_assert originate exclusively from the assert() macro, which passes __FILE__ (a compile-time preprocessor constant guaranteed non-null by the C standard) and #test or "test" (string literals, also non-null). No direct external callers passing arbitrary pointers exist in the codebase, and stderr and the _() gettext macro on a string literal are likewise never null.
